# hasParameters()

**Instance Method**

Checks whether the composition that is currently edited by the composition parameter view has any input parameters.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func hasParameters() -> Bool
```

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the composition has any input parameters.
